def test_pipeline_execution():

        result = subprocess.run(
            ["python", "-m", "bytewax.run", "pipeline:flow", "-r", "./recovery_dir", "-s", "1", "-b", "0"],
            cwd=PROJECT_DIR,
            capture_output=True,
            text=True
